post.title: Brotherhood of Steel Encampment
post.heading: 3D Printing the Brotherhood of Steel Encampment
post.description: 3D Printing the Brotherhood of Steel Encampment for Fallout Wasteland Warfare.
post.content:
> Image © 2022 [Modiphius Entertainment](https://modiphius.net)

# Table of contents

# Intro

Although the `Print at Home` terrain is designed to be printed on a Resin printer there has been some success at [printing them on a regular 3D printer](https://modiphius.net/blogs/news/community-interview).

# Brotherhood of Steel Encampment
